---
title: "gm2_windows"
---

Time-modulating functions for the windows contributions to g-2

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/gm2_windows.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/gm2_windows.py)
:::


*No public definitions found in this module.*
